name: aithos-protocol-workspace
description: Aithos protocol monorepo: protocol-core library, CLI, and MCP server.
author: Mathieu Colla <mathieu.colla.pro@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@aithos/agent-tools && npm run build --workspace=@aithos/protocol-core && npm run build --workspace=aithos && npm run build --workspace=@aithos/mcp
